phases: Phase 2: Write-path hook + recovery-aware routing (TDD first)

limitations: Snapshot survives accidental docs/ deletion and git clean -fd, NOT git clean -fdx (backup dir is gitignored)
Operator convenience, not evidence; non-forgeable durability out of scope
non_goals: No automatic restore; operator restores deliberately
No change to seed/bootstrap semantics for genuinely-new workspaces
exclusions: Scaffold-owned artifacts (BACKLOG/FEATURE_INDEX/GOVERNANCE_INDEX) excluded from snapshot set
